title: WPC Exterior Louvers
shortDescription: Premium UV-coated WPC exterior louvers for modern building facades, balcony ceilings, and outdoor walls. 100% waterproof, termite-proof, fade-resistant, and maintenance-free for Delhi NCR weather.
longDescription:
Upgrade your building's front elevation with Goals Floors' premium WPC Exterior Louvers. If you want a beautiful wooden facade but want to avoid the heavy maintenance, rotting, and termite issues of real wood, this is the perfect solution.

Designed specifically for the extreme summer heat and heavy monsoons of Delhi NCR, these exterior cladding panels are 100% waterproof and UV-protected. They will not fade, warp, or crack under direct sunlight. Whether you are designing a modern commercial building in Gurgaon, cladding a luxury villa in South Delhi, or creating a privacy screen for a balcony, our louvers give a striking 3D architectural look.

As a leading outdoor supplier, we offer materials that provide unparalleled structural strength against heavy winds, with absolutely zero yearly maintenance or polishing required.

features.title: 100% Weatherproof & Waterproof
features.description: Completely safe from heavy rain and moisture. It absorbs zero water, meaning it will never swell, rot, or get fungal decay like natural wood.

features.title: Advanced UV Protection
features.description: Specially engineered with a protective UV shield so the beautiful wooden color will not fade or discolor under the harsh direct sunlight.

features.title: Zero Yearly Maintenance
features.description: Say goodbye to expensive yearly polishing, painting, or varnishing. These louvers retain their premium look with just an occasional water wash.

features.title: Termite & Borer Proof
features.description: The strong polymer composite core is completely immune to insects. It offers a lifetime of structural safety from termites (deemak).

features.title: High Structural Strength
features.description: Highly rigid and impact-resistant. They are specifically designed to safely withstand heavy wind loads on high-rise building facades.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Design
features.description: Made from sustainable and 100% recyclable materials, giving you premium architectural quality without harming the environment.

installation: The installation is highly secure and durable. A strong sub-frame of Aluminium or MS (Iron) pipes is fixed to the wall. The louvers are then interlocked onto this frame using specialized hidden stainless-steel clips. This ensures maximum wind-load capacity and leaves no ugly screws visible on the outside.
maintenance: It is virtually maintenance-free. You can simply use a standard water hose to wash away exterior dust. For stubborn dirt or bird droppings, use a soft brush with mild soapy water. Never use harsh industrial acids.

faqs.question: What are WPC Exterior Louvers used for?
faqs.answer: They are premium architectural panels used on the outside of buildings (front elevations, boundary walls, balconies) to give a luxurious, 3D wooden look.

faqs.question: Can WPC exterior louvers be installed directly under sunlight and rain?
faqs.answer: Yes. These louvers are specially manufactured for outdoor use and are fully UV-protected, waterproof, and weather-resistant for harsh Indian climate conditions.

faqs.question: Which is better for exterior walls: WPC Louvers or ACP Sheets?
faqs.answer: WPC louvers provide a warmer and more premium wooden architectural look compared to ACP sheets. They also offer better aesthetics for luxury homes, villas, and facade elevations.

faqs.question: Can these louvers be installed on curved or custom designs?
faqs.answer: Yes, experienced fabricators can customize the metal framework to create unique facade patterns, feature walls, and designer elevations.

faqs.question: Will the color fade in the hot summer sun of Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: No. Our WPC exterior louvers have an advanced UV-resistant shield. This technology protects the material from cracking or fading under intense direct sunlight.

faqs.question: Are they safe from heavy rain and monsoons?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! They are 100% waterproof and non-porous. Rainwater simply washes off the surface without being absorbed, so they will never rot or get fungus.

faqs.question: Do I need to polish them every year like real wood?
faqs.answer: Not at all. This is the biggest advantage of WPC. It requires zero painting or polishing, saving you a huge amount of maintenance cost over the years.

faqs.question: How are they installed on the building?
faqs.answer: A strong metal frame (Aluminum or Iron) is fixed to the wall, and the louvers are locked onto this frame using hidden clips. This makes them very safe against heavy winds.

faqs.question: Can I use these louvers for my balcony ceiling?
faqs.answer: Yes! They are highly recommended for balcony ceilings and privacy screens. They add a rich wooden touch outdoors without the risk of moisture damage.

faqs.question: Are they safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, the polymer composite core cannot be eaten by insects. It is 100% termite and borer proof for its entire lifetime.

faqs.question: What is the difference between WPC louvers and HPL sheets?
faqs.answer: HPL (High-Pressure Laminate) sheets are completely flat. WPC louvers have a rich, 3D fluted (ribbed) design that creates beautiful shadows and gives a much more premium architectural look.

faqs.question: How do you finish the sharp corners of the walls?
faqs.answer: We provide matching WPC L-Profiles for every color. These profiles perfectly cover the edges and 90-degree corners to give a clean, professional finish.

faqs.question: Do you supply these for large commercial building projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier B2B supplier. We offer tiered project pricing, ready stocks, and dedicated support for architects, builders, and contractors across Delhi NCR.

installationSteps.title: Make the Metal Frame
points: Create a strong base frame using Aluminum or Iron pipes.
Secure the frame tightly to the building wall.

installationSteps.title: Align the First Louver
points: Place the first louver perfectly straight along the edge.
Check the alignment using a leveler tool.

installationSteps.title: Use Hidden Clips
points: Lock the louvers onto the metal frame using the special stainless steel clips.
These clips are hidden behind the panels, so no screws are visible.

installationSteps.title: Finish the Corners
points: Once all panels are installed, use the matching L-Profiles on the 90-degree corners.
This gives the facade a clean and professional border.
